---
name:  Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve and fix errors.
title: '[BUG] - <Brief Description>'
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

###  Describe the Bug
<!-- Just say exactly what is broken right now without overcomplicating it -->
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

###  Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Commands needed to make the bug happen again. -->
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error '...'

###  Context
<!-- What environment are you running? Fill in your versions below. -->
* **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS]
* **Python Version:** [e.g., 3.10]
* **TensorFlow/Keras Version:** [e.g., 2.15]

###  Expected Behavior
<!-- What the correct, working behavior should look like. -->
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

###  Screenshots / Error Logs
<!-- Just drop a screenshot or paste the red error text from your terminal. -->
If applicable, add screenshots or paste terminal stack traces here to help explain your problem.

###  Additional Context
<!-- For anything else not covered above -->
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., model weights used, specific MRI image parameters).
